message: Add toggle to hide city goods icons on map
Add mountain pass corridors through Alps for traversable routes to Italy
Add How to Play tutorial dropdown to legend panel
Wire foreign track toggle to build commit with network-aware connectivity

Align deliver button with pickup button vertical midline
Shrink pickup button to match deliver button format
Improve pickup goods visibility with demand-matching highlights and larger buttons

Prominent cash display, phase badges, and movement progress bar
Fix post-commit hook and increase recent updates to 20 commits
Client sends all ferry edges in commitBuild payload and fix building from ferry ports
Fix ferry crossing not consuming movement when traversing already-owned ferries
Add post-commit hook to auto-regenerate commits.json
Immediate card animation at game start and after discard
Fix demand card highlight persistence across turns and deliveries
Persistent train card rendering during other players' turns
Persistent demand card rendering during other players' turns
